restart_discord-bot_0fab9e3b.sh
programs.source_code:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-generated by Nova Security Sentinel
# Fixes: discord-bot port 3001 not responding
# Generated: 2026-04-08T12:31:56.610680+00:00

set -e

PORT=3001
SERVICE="discord-bot"
WORKSPACE="/home/cayden/discord bot/discord bot"

echo "Checking if $SERVICE is running on port $PORT..."

# Kill existing process on port if any
PID=$(lsof -ti:$PORT 2>/dev/null || true)
if [ -n "$PID" ]; then
    echo "Found process $PID on port $PORT — killing..."
    kill "$PID" 2>/dev/null || true
    sleep 2
fi

echo "Starting $SERVICE..."
if [ -n "cd "/home/cayden/discord bot/discord bot" && npm start" ]; then
    nohup bash -c 'cd "/home/cayden/discord bot/discord bot" && npm start' >> /tmp/"$SERVICE".log 2>&1 &
    echo "Started $SERVICE (PID: $!)"
else
    echo "No auto-start command configured for $SERVICE — manual restart required"
    exit 0
fi

sleep 3
if [ "$PORT" -gt 0 ] && lsof -ti:$PORT >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "SUCCESS: $SERVICE is running on port $PORT"
else
    echo "WARNING: $SERVICE may not have started — check /tmp/$SERVICE.log"
fi
programs.execution_output:

Starting discord-bot...
No auto-start command configured for discord-bot — manual restart required

programs.name: npm_fix_discord-bot_08243110.sh
programs.source_code:
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-generated by Nova Security Sentinel
# Fixes: discord-bot: 8 high/critical npm vulnerabilities
# Generated: 2026-04-08T12:32:00.143895+00:00

set -e

# Navigate to service directory
if [ -d "/home/cayden/discord bot/discord bot" ] && [ -f "/home/cayden/discord bot/discord bot/package.json" ]; then
    cd "/home/cayden/discord bot/discord bot"
else
    cd "/home/cayden/discord bot/discord bot"
fi
if [ ! -f "package.json" ]; then echo "ERROR: No package.json found — cannot run npm audit"; exit 1; fi

echo "Running npm audit..."
npm audit --production 2>&1 || true

echo ""
echo "Attempting automatic fix..."
npm audit fix --production 2>&1 || true

echo ""
echo "Post-fix audit:"
npm audit --production 2>&1 || true

echo "DONE: dependency vulnerabilities addressed for discord-bot"

#!/bin/bash
# Auto-generated by Nova Security Sentinel
# Finding: nova-backend: missing security headers
# Service: nova-backend
# Severity: low
# Category: config
# Generated: 2026-04-08T12:32:06.644881+00:00
# Description: Missing: X-Content-Type-Options (Prevents MIME sniffing), X-Frame-Options (Prevents clickjacking)

set -e

echo "======================================"
echo "  Nova Security Sentinel — Auto Fix"
echo "  Finding: nova-backend: missing security headers"
echo "  Service: nova-backend"
echo "======================================"
echo ""

# ── Phase 1: Investigate ──────────────
echo "[Phase 1] Investigating..."
echo "Checking configuration for nova-backend..."
echo "Issue: nova-backend: missing security headers"
echo ""

# ── Phase 2: Fix ──────────────────────
echo "[Phase 2] Applying fix..."
echo "Generating new strong secret..."
NEW_SECRET=$(python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_urlsafe(48))")
echo "Generated: $NEW_SECRET"
echo "NOTE: Manual .env update required — copy this secret to the relevant config"
echo ""

echo "======================================"
echo "  Fix complete. Review output above."
echo "======================================"
